labkipageformsinputs-date-placeholder: Placeholder shown in the date input field. Format string for ISO 8601 date.
labkipageformsinputs-time-placeholder: Placeholder shown in the time input field. Format string for 24-hour time.
labkipageformsinputs-tz-placeholder: Placeholder shown in the timezone selector when no zone has been chosen.
labkipageformsinputs-tz-wiki-local: Label for the option that records the value without a timezone offset (interpreted as the wiki's local time).
labkipageformsinputs-tz-shortlist-label: Group label for the curated shortlist of common timezones in the picker.
labkipageformsinputs-tz-all-zones: Button label that expands the timezone selector to show the full IANA list. Trailing ellipsis is intentional.
